name: bow-agent
description: AI agent nhận đề tài / WBS / Jira ticket rồi tự lập kế hoạch và thực thi (plan-then-approve). Tái sử dụng cho nhiều dự án.

scripts.ui: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run ui:api" "npm run ui:web"
scripts.ui:qc: BOW_QC_MODE=true concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run ui:api" "vite --host"
scripts.ui:review: BOW_REVIEWER_MODE=true concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run ui:api" "vite --host"
scripts.ui:restart: npm run ui:stop && npm run ui:qc
scripts.ui:preview: npm run ui:build && node --loader tsx src/web/server.ts
scripts.ui:qc:share: BOW_QC_MODE=true BOW_QC_CWD=/Users/tuannguyen/GitProject/monorepo BOW_AGENT_PORT=4001 BOW_WEB_PORT=5174 concurrently -n qc-api,qc-web -c magenta,cyan "npm run ui:api" "vite --host --port 5174"
scripts.ui:collab: BOW_COLLAB_MODE=true BOW_COLLAB_CWD=/Users/tuannguyen/GitProject/monorepo BOW_AGENT_PORT=4002 BOW_WEB_PORT=5175 concurrently -n collab-api,collab-web -c yellow,red "npm run ui:api" "vite --host --port 5175"
scripts.ui:ba: BOW_BA_MODE=true BOW_BA_CWD=/Users/tuannguyen/GitProject/monorepo BOW_AGENT_PORT=4003 BOW_WEB_PORT=5176 concurrently -n ba-api,ba-web -c blue,cyan "npm run ui:api" "vite --host --port 5176"
scripts.ui:review:share: BOW_REVIEWER_MODE=true BOW_REVIEWER_CWD=/Users/tuannguyen/GitProject/monorepo BOW_AGENT_PORT=4004 BOW_WEB_PORT=5177 concurrently -n review-api,review-web -c magenta,cyan "npm run ui:api" "vite --host --port 5177"
